subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam Qabl-Ḥusayn! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee whilst seated upon the throne of imprisonment, by reason of that which hands have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل حسین یذکرک المظلوم اذ کان مستویا علی عرش السجن بما اکتسبت ایدی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
